title: JESUH KIANGAH KA PIA DING HI

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Hong gum Topa kei mah in ah
Na khempeuh paai in zui ning
Ka Topa aw Nang mah in
ah
Lam honghilh Pa Na hi ding

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Na khempeuh paai a, Na khempeuh paai a
Na
khempeuh Topa khut sungah
Kei mah’n hong pai ning

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Hong gum Topa kei mah in
ah
Nang ma kiang ka hong nai hi
Ki sik a thu pha kong ngetna
Ngai in hong gum in kong
ci,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Hong gum Topa kei mah in ah
Leitung nopna ka nusia
Kha Siangtho le Topa
Pasian
Hong om in ka lungsungah
